adjudication_raw: Votes: a1=critique_wins, a2=critique_wins, a3=critique_wins. Unanimous: critique_wins
assessor_1_raw: Assessor 1: Peak threshold from full dataset leaks future labels. Architecture unspecified. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Assessor 2: Multiple underspecified elements: metric, architecture, class balance handling. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Assessor 3: Look-ahead weather and normalization scope are concerning but may be minor. Main gap is unspecified architecture and metric. Verdict: critique_wins.
